definitions.text: The usually green and flat organ that represents the most prominent feature of most vegetative plants.
A foliage leaf or any of the many and often considerably different structures it can specialise into.
Anything resembling the leaf of a plant.
To produce leaves; put forth foliage.
To divide (a vegetable) into separate leaves.
examples: The lettuce in our burgers is 100% hand-leafed.

definitions.text: To play a prank on someone by throwing a large clump or collection of leaves at them.
